/usr/bin/ar qc libpreviews-lib.a "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/ActionButton.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/ActionLink.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/ApplicationPreview.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/GenericPreview.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/MusicPreview.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/MoviePreview.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/PaymentPreview.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/Preview.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/PreviewContainer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/PreviewInfoHintWidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/PreviewNavigator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/PreviewRatingsWidget.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/SocialPreview.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/SocialPreviewContent.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/SocialPreviewComments.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/TabIterator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/Track.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/Tracks.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/MusicPaymentPreview.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/previews-lib.dir/ErrorPreview.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libpreviews-lib.a
